decision_title: Exclusive SSO Login
evidence_quotes: Users will log in exclusively via SSO through the external Portal.

decision_title: No Internal Login or Registration Functionality
evidence_quotes: This system will not implement its own login or registration functionality.

decision_title: Prioritize Photo Upload Feature for V1
evidence_quotes: Two main features to prioritize: 1. Photo upload

decision_title: Prioritize Output Modeling Feature for V1
evidence_quotes: Two main features to prioritize: 2. Output modeling

decision_title: Sidebar to Distinguish Album and Project Folder Types
evidence_quotes: The sidebar needs to distinguish between two folder types — 'Album' and 'Project'

decision_title: Separate Management of Photos and Modeling Data
evidence_quotes: managing photos and modeling data separately

decision_title: Album - Support Adding Photos
evidence_quotes: The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos

decision_title: Album - Support Deleting Photos
evidence_quotes: The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos

decision_title: Album - Support Searching Photos
evidence_quotes: The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos

decision_title: Modeling Progress Bar Display
evidence_quotes: Modeling progress must be shown as a progress bar

decision_title: Detailed Modeling Progress Stages
evidence_quotes: displaying the status of each stage (AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation, etc.)

decision_title: Photo Selection for Project Import
evidence_quotes: When creating a project, users can select photos from the photo list to import into the project folder

decision_title: Project Sharing Capability (Future Version)
evidence_quotes: Project sharing: A project folder can designate other users to jointly view the modeling results

decision_title: Album Privacy Restricted to Owner Only
evidence_quotes: Albums are private to the owner only

decision_title: Albums Do Not Support Multi-User Access
evidence_quotes: Albums are private to the owner only and do not support multi-user access

decision_title: Resumable Uploads (Future Version)
evidence_quotes: Resumable uploads: If an upload is interrupted, upload progress is preserved via a caching mechanism, supporting resume-from-breakpoint

decision_title: Storage Quota Display on Personal Page (Future Version)
evidence_quotes: Storage quota management: The user's personal page displays used and remaining storage

decision_title: Dynamic Photo Upload Limit Adjustment (Future Version)
evidence_quotes: each user's photo-upload limit can be dynamically adjusted based on system settings and permissions

decision_title: AT Computation Error Handling with Parameter Adjustment (Future Version)
evidence_quotes: AT error handling: When AT computation fails, provide a mechanism to adjust parameters and re-run

decision_title: V1 Implementation of Normal Mode Only
evidence_quotes: V1 will implement Normal Mode only

decision_title: Expert Mode with Adjustable Parameters (Future Version)
evidence_quotes: After photo upload, distinguish between 'Normal Mode' (default parameters) and 'Expert Mode' (freely adjustable parameters)
